# Pull Request

## Related Issue

Closes #

---

## Overview

Provide a concise description of the problem addressed and the approach used to implement the solution.

### Why is this change needed?

Explain the motivation behind this contribution and the value it brings to the project.

---

## Implementation Details

* Describe the key modifications introduced.
* Mention affected files, modules, or components.
* List any new dependencies, configurations, or integrations added.
* Highlight any noteworthy design decisions.

---

## Testing & Validation

Describe how the changes were verified and provide reproduction steps where applicable.

### Automated Testing

* [ ] Existing test suite passes successfully
* [ ] New tests added (if required)
* Command(s) used:

  ```bash
  python -m pytest
  ```

### Manual Verification

* Describe the manual checks performed.
* Confirm expected behavior after the changes.
* Mention browser/device/responsive testing if applicable.

---

## Screenshots / Demonstration

If this PR includes UI, UX, or visual updates, attach screenshots, GIFs, or recordings below.

<!-- Add screenshots, recordings, or links here -->

---

## Project Impact

How does this contribution improve AgentWatch?

* [ ] Code Quality
* [ ] Documentation
* [ ] Developer Experience
* [ ] Performance
* [ ] Reliability
* [ ] User Experience
* [ ] Other

Provide any additional impact details below.

---

## Reviewer Notes

Include any context, assumptions, limitations, or areas that may require special attention during review.

---

## Contributor Checklist

* [ ] Changes follow the repository's contribution guidelines.
* [ ] Tested locally and verified expected behavior.
* [ ] No unrelated files or modifications are included.
* [ ] Documentation has been updated where applicable.
* [ ] Related issue has been linked correctly.
* [ ] Self-review completed before submission.
* [ ] Ready for maintainer review.
